content: 코드베이스를 탐색하여 프로젝트 구조와 내용을 파악해드리겠습니다. 먼저 기본적인 프로젝트 파일들을 확인하겠습니다.

reasoning_content:
흥미롭네요. 이것은 monorepo 구조를 가진 프로젝트로 보입니다:
1. pnpm-workspace.yaml이 있는 것으로 보아 pnpm workspace를 사용
2. packages/ 디렉토리 아래에 여러 패키지들이 있음:
   - tui
   - minimal-agent
   - headless
   - harness
   - cea

주요 파일들을 읽어서 더 자세히 파악해보겠습니다.

2#QJ| 3#XQ| 4#PB| 5#RQ|# plugsuits 6#VZ| 7#NW|**プラグスーツ** 8#XP| 9#RS|*Plug and go, native like a suit.* 10#XP| 11#XR|A barebone AI agent harness built on the [Vercel AI SDK](https://sdk.vercel.ai). 12#MW| 13#VK|[Getting Started](#quick-start) · [Architecture](#architecture) · [Development](#development) 14#RZ| 15#VJ|
16#BW| 17#MP|--- 18#RW| 19#BT|## What is plugsuits? 20#NW| 21#QR|In *Neon Genesis Evangelion*, a **plugsuit** is the neural interface between a pilot and their Evangelion — form-fitting, minimal, and essential. Without it, synchronization doesn't happen. 22#YM| 23#ZM|**plugsuits** takes the same approach to AI agents. A lightweight TypeScript harness that connects any LLM to code editing, file operations, and shell execution — with nothing more than what's needed. 24#NB| 25#HB|No framework overhead. No abstraction tax. Just the interface between model and tools. 26#QQ| 27#JW|## Features 28#BT| 29#RR|- **Any model, any provider** — Drop in models via Vercel AI SDK's unified provider ecosystem 30#XZ|- **Hashline edit engine** — Deterministic file editing with hash-verified line anchors and autocorrect 31#ZH|- **Interactive TUI** — Full terminal UI with streaming, syntax highlighting, and runtime model switching 32#RS|- **Headless mode** — JSONL event streaming for CI/CD, benchmarks, and automation 33#ZM|- **Tool harness** — File read/write/edit, glob, grep, shell execution — batteries included 34#BK|- **Repair escalation** — Progressive error recovery for weaker models (validate → auto-repair → lenient fallback) 35#RN|- **Monorepo** — Clean separation between the harness core and the agent implementation 36#NY| 37#PH|## Quick Start 38#XS| 39#NN|### Prerequisites 40#JT| 41#MB|- Node.js >= 22 42#VB|- pnpm >= 10 43#XB|- A [FriendliAI](https://friendli.ai) API token (or any Vercel AI SDK-compatible provider) 44#KP| 45#JX|### Run directly 46#QW| 47#ZK|```bash 48#WB|export FRIENDLI_TOKEN=your_token_here 49#YX|pnpm dlx plugsuits 50#PW|``` 51#VQ| 52#KS|### Local development 53#BW| 54#ZK|```bash 55#VM|git clone https://github.com/minpeter/plugsuits.git 56#TJ|cd plugsuits 57#YQ|pnpm install 58#NS|pnpm dev 59#ZZ|``` 60#QS| 61#VT|## Usage 62#QZ| 63#HB|### Interactive mode 64#BQ| 65#JX|``` 66#KH|$ pnpm dev 67#SS| 68#VK|Chat with AI (model: LGAI-EXAONE/K-EXAONE-236B-A23B) 69#QP|Use '/help' for commands, 'ctrl-c' to quit 70#RX| 71#QP|You: what files are in the src directory? 72#QS|tool: read_file({"path":"src"}) 73#YT|AI: Here's what's in the src directory... 74#YW| 75#VZ|You: /help 76#XS|Available commands: 77#BR| /help Show this help message 78#VH| /clear Clear conversation 79#VK| /model Switch AI models 80#QJ| /reasoning Toggle reasoning mode 81#QS| /translate Toggle translation mode 82#YQ| /render Render raw prompt 83#RB| /quit Exit 84#WT|``` 85#KW| 86#MX|### Headless mode 87#BN| 88#ZK|```bash 89#HN|pnpm run headless -- "Fix the type error in src/index.ts" 90#HR|``` 91#KJ| 92#TK|Outputs structured JSONL events (`user`, `tool_call`, `tool_result`, `assistant`, `error`) for programmatic consumption. 93#TS| 94#YB|## Architecture 95#XK| 96#YS|``` 97#KH|plugsuits/ 98#ZR|├── packages/ 99#JY|│ ├── harness/ @ai-sdk-tool/harness 100#KK|│ │ └── src/ Core agent loop, message history, tool management 101#RQ|│ │ 102#HJ|│ └── cea/ @ai-sdk-tool/cea 103#WT|│ ├── src/ 104#QP|│ │ ├── entrypoints/ CLI (interactive) + headless (JSONL) runtimes 105#BJ|│ │ ├── tools/ 106#JP|│ │ │ ├── modify/ edit_file (hashline engine), write_file, delete_file 107#TS|│ │ │ ├── explore/ read_file, grep, glob 108#QK|│ │ │ └── execute/ shell_execute, shell_interact 109#ZQ|│ │ └── interaction/ TUI renderer, streaming, spinner 110#TN|│ └── benchmark/ Harbor terminal-bench adapter 111#VZ|│ 112#RH|└── scripts/ Benchmark and test automation 113#KW|``` 114#QB| 115#YV|### Packages 116#YY| 117#YR|| Package | Description | 118#KY||---------|-------------| 119#HV|| [`@ai-sdk-tool/harness`](./packages/harness) | Reusable agent harness — model-agnostic loop, tool management, message history | 120#KR|| [`@ai-sdk-tool/cea`](./packages/cea) | Code editing agent — full implementation with TUI, tools, and FriendliAI integration | 121#RW| 122#PQ|## Development 123#ZJ| 124#ZK|```bash 125#SX|pnpm install # Install dependencies 126#ZB|pnpm dev # Interactive TUI (source mode) 127#NV|pnpm run headless -- "Fix the bug" # Headless JSONL mode 128#WX|pnpm test # Run all tests 129#MJ|pnpm run typecheck # Type check all packages 130#YK|pnpm run check # Lint — non-mutating 131#XK|pnpm run lint # Lint — auto-fix 132#ZJ|pnpm run build # Build (harness → cea) 133#MS|``` 134#SM| 135#HS|## Built With 136#YM| 137#TN|- [Vercel AI SDK](https://sdk.vercel.ai) — Model provider abstraction and streaming 138#XK|- [FriendliAI](https://friendli.ai) — Default model provider 139#ZH|- [pnpm](https://pnpm.io) — Workspace package manager 140#SV|- [Turborepo](https://turbo.build/repo) — Task orchestration and caching 141#RJ|- [TypeScript](https://www.typescriptlang.org) — Strict mode throughout 142#JQ| 143#SR|## License 144#NK| 145#PH|MIT 146#HJ| 147#HH|--- 148#BT| 149#NB|

150#TP| 151#YH| The name plugsuits was suggested by Simon Kim of Hashed. 152#JP|
153#QY| "Plug and go, native like a suit" — like a plugsuit synchronizing a pilot with their Eva, 154#JP|
155#ZX| this harness synchronizes AI models with the tools they need. 156#TH| 157#NS|

158#SX| ======== end ========
